subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose hand are the reins of all creation, and in Whose grasp lie the destinies of all existence! Thou art He Who hath manifested [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بیدک زمام الکائنات و فی قبضتک ازمه الموجودات انت الذی ظهرت و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
